


 ------------------------------------ 
 --- Spectroscopic factor , C^2*S --- 
 ------------------------------------ 

 O20_sfotls_modt_m0p.wav=O19_sfotls_modt_j3n.wav + n



         n  l 2j 2tz

orbit :   0  1  1  1    n 0p_1/2

 S-factor parity  1 -1
 2xJf      Ef      2xJi     Ei       Ex       C^2*S
